Selected work

My Work

01
BRC Transport Management
Software Development

A web platform for Bhavishya Road Carriers to digitize trip management, billing, and financial tracking. Features automated invoice generation, P&L reporting, and Proof of Delivery uploads — eliminating manual errors across the business.

React Node.js TypeScript MongoDB
BRC Transport Management
Live Project
02
QR Based Ordering in Cafe
Web Application

A contactless café ordering system — customers scan a QR code at their table to browse the menu and place orders instantly. Real-time WebSocket updates push orders to the kitchen, cutting delays and manual errors for modern cafés.

JavaScript React WebSocket Node.js
03
Fintech App
Money Mate
Personal Finance Tracker

A smart personal finance app that tracks daily expenses, manages EMI schedules, monitors savings goals, and delivers a clear picture of your financial health — all in one clean interface.
